entities.name: WATERSHED PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs designed for the comprehensive management of water and land resources within a watershed to improve agricultural outcomes.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the watershed programs and rainfed agriculture are being assessed.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input, which the Millennium Project aims to increase for food-insecure farmers.

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The biological, chemical, and physical state of the soil, identified as a key area for improvement to boost productivity.

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE WATER MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Localized systems for managing water resources to ensure sustainable agricultural production.

entities.name: QUALITY SEEDS
entities.description: High-quality seed varieties that require improved accessibility and quality for farmers.

entities.name: FARM ENTERPRISES
entities.description: Various agricultural business activities and ventures that should be diversified to improve farmer livelihoods.

entities.name: EXTENSION SERVICE
entities.description: The application of scientific research and knowledge to agricultural practices through professional support services.

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies exclusively on rainfall for water, characterized by low productivity in India.

entities.name: ARABLE LAND
entities.description: Land that is suitable for growing crops.
